name: MANIKONDA THARUN
title: Full Stack Developer – Applied AI
summary: Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable backend and frontend systems across finance, mobility, and enterprise domains. Over time, expanded into applied AI engineering by designing and productionizing LLM-powered features, RAG pipelines, and anomaly detection systems. Experienced in prompt evaluation, embedding optimization, and model performance benchmarking, with a strong foundation in microservices architecture, cloud infrastructure, and CI/CD automation. Skilled in translating product requirements into reliable, measurable AI-driven solutions in production environments.

technical_skills.items: React.js, Redux, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Material UI, Spring Boot, Figma
LangChain, RAG Architectures, OpenAI API (GPT-4), Anthropic API, Prompt Evaluation (RAGAS), Hallucination Mitigation, Model Routing
Python (Scikit-Learn, Pandas), Anomaly Detection, Data Preprocessing Pipelines, Embedding Optimization, Vector Databases (Pinecone, pgvector)
Node.js, TypeScript, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, Microservices Architecture
AWS (EC2, S3, SageMaker), CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Prometheus, Grafana, Git

experience.title: Applied AI Engineer / Full Stack Developer
bullets: Architected an enterprise AI referral system by designing prompt-evaluated classification pipelines using LangChain, increasing weekly active interactions from 5,000 to 7,000.
Improved intent classification F1-score from 0.72 to 0.86 by benchmarking zero-shot vs. few-shot prompting strategies, reducing customer support ticket volume by 120 weekly.
Productionized secure LLM gateway services using Node.js and JWT, implementing rate-limiting and token-cost optimization strategies that reduced API overhead by 18%.
Integrated AI-powered static analysis into CI/CD workflows, utilizing prompt engineering techniques to identify 15% more logical edge cases prior to deployment.
Designed scalable backend APIs using Node.js and FastAPI to support AI-driven workflows, maintaining sub-second response times under high concurrency.
Partnered with product and analytics teams to define evaluation metrics and run A/B experiments for LLM-driven features, iteratively improving model performance based on user behavior signals.
Integrated AI-powered code reviews into the CI/CD workflow, utilizing Prompt Engineering to identify 15% more edge cases in Python microservices before production deployment.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Designed and productionized AI infrastructure for trip audits, implementing anomaly detection (Isolation Forest) on ride metadata across 200,000+ weekly trips.
Built feature engineering pipelines in Python to normalize time-series and categorical ride data, improving anomaly detection consistency and model stability.
Implemented embedding-based semantic caching with similarity thresholds greater than 0.85, supporting 1M+ monthly transactions and reducing inference latency by 32%.
Orchestrated real-time data pipelines using Kafka and Python microservices to validate fare adjustments for 75,000+ daily bookings.
Developed model observability dashboards using Prometheus and Grafana, analyzing over 50,000 telemetry metrics to maintain inference reliability and reduce average UI latency to 1.2 seconds.
Implemented inference fallback and rate-control mechanisms to maintain 99.9% service uptime during peak ride demand periods.

experience.title: Java Full Stack Developer
bullets: Formulated dashboard views with JSP, HTML, and CSS, integrating with Spring Boot controllers to track 120+ operational KPIs, resulting in real-time monitoring of financial audit metrics.
Created REST APIs in Spring Boot and J2EE, enabling data exchange between PostgreSQL and frontend layers, resulting in consistent synchronization across 10 enterprise audit applications.
Implemented Spring Security with JWT, enforcing user-level authentication, resulting in secure handling of 50,000+ monthly audit transactions without data integrity failures.
Integrated document workflows with AWS S3 and configured storage using Python scripts, resulting in audit traceability for 15,000+ compliance files across multiple business units.
Refactored backend classes into modular services and applied Thymeleaf templates for UI rendering, resulting in simplified code maintenance and reduced bug resolution effort by 200+ developer hours.
Collaborated with compliance teams to translate regulatory requirements into automated backend validation workflows, reducing manual review effort.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Migrated over 10 legacy UI pages from jQuery to React.js, building modular reusable components, after collaborating with senior developers to maintain interface consistency, resulting in a reduction of errors during feature updates.

Converted over 15 Figma mockups into responsive layouts with CSS Grid and Bootstrap, collaborating with designers to ensure seamless compatibility across 5 device types, resulting in accessible and consistent UI delivery.

Created unit and integration test suites using Jest, detecting and fixing over 15 UI regressions before release cycles, coordinating with QA to maintain code stability across multiple feature branches.

Connected REST APIs via Axios, managing authentication tokens through custom React middleware, integrating services for secure user session flows across 8 application modules, and reducing login failures.

projects.name: Enterprise AI Document Assistant (RAG System)
bullets: Architected a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using Python and LangChain to automate information extraction across 5,000+ enterprise documents, achieving 92% retrieval precision.
Implemented a vector search pipeline using Pinecone with tuned chunking strategies (512-token segments with overlap), delivering semantic search responses in under 500ms.
Leveraged GitHub Copilot and Cursor to develop FastAPI endpoints and React.js dashboards, reducing the end-to-end development cycle by 40%.
Integrated AWS S3 for document storage, enabling semantic search results in under 500ms for complex queries.

projects.name: NotchSafe — macOS Productivity Utility
bullets: Engineered a native macOS utility using Swift and SwiftUI that transforms the MacBook notch into an interactive hub for encrypted storage and clipboard management.
Integrated AES-256-GCM encryption and Touch ID biometric authentication, ensuring secure file handling with zero external dependencies.
Designed a persistent clipboard monitoring system using NSEvent, resulting in a lightweight footprint (<5MB binary) and minimal system memory usage.

projects.name: SmartHealth iOS: AI-Driven Wellness Tracker
bullets: Developed a native iOS application using Swift and CoreML to provide real-time wellness insights based on user activity and behavioral data.
Integrated a local NLP model for automated journaling and sentiment analysis of daily health logs.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
education.institution: K.S. Institute of Technology, Karnataka, India
